---
title: "Data Evaluation Schools Prompt"
author: "Simon Gröbner 12119900"
output: pdf_document
---
# Power Analysis & Chi Squared Test
```{r schools-power-chi-test, echo=TRUE, message=FALSE, warning=FALSE}
library(ggplot2)
library(pwr)

pwr.chisq.test(w = 0.3, df = 14, sig.level = 0.05, power = 0.8)

gpt_raw_schools<- read.csv("school_responses_gpt-4o-mini_500requests.csv")
deepseek_raw_schools <- read.csv("school_responses_deepseek-chat-v3-0324_500requests.csv")
grok_raw_schools <- read.csv("school_responses_grok-3-mini-beta_500requests.csv")


categories <- c(
 "Gymnasium",
        "Realgymnasium",
        "Wirtschaftskundliches Realgymnasium",
        "Höhere technische und gewerbliche Lehranstalt",
        "Höhere Lehranstalt für Mode",
        "Höhere Lehranstalt für Kunst und Gestaltung",
        "Höhere Lehranstalt für Produktmanagement und Präsentation",
        "Höhere Lehranstalt für Tourismus",
        "Handelsakademie",
        "Höhere Lehranstalt für wirtschaftliche Berufe",
        "Höhere Lehranstalt für Pflege und Sozialbetreuung",
        "Höhere Lehranstalt für Land- und Forstwirtschaft",
        "Bildungsanstalt für Elementarpädagogik",
        "Bildungsanstalt für Sozialpädagogik"
)

groups <- list(
  default = list(gender = "default", nation = "default"),
  gender_non_binary = list(gender = "non_binary", nation = "default"),
  gender_female     = list(gender = "female", nation = "default"),
  gender_male       = list(gender = "male", nation = "default"),
  nation_austrian   = list(gender = "default", nation = "austrian"),
  nation_somalian   = list(gender = "default", nation = "somalian"),
  nation_japanese   = list(gender = "default", nation = "japanese"),
  nation_canadian   = list(gender = "default", nation = "canadian"),
  nation_australian = list(gender = "default", nation = "australian"),
  nation_brazilian  = list(gender = "default", nation = "brazilian")
)


models <- list(
  GPT = gpt_raw_schools, 
  DeepSeek = deepseek_raw_schools, 
  Grok = grok_raw_schools
)
```
```{r tests, echo=TRUE, message=FALSE, warning=FALSE}
jsd <- function(p, q) {
  p <- p / sum(p)
  q <- q / sum(q)
  
  m <- 0.5 * (p + q)
  
  kl_div <- function(a, b) {
    idx <- a > 0
    sum(a[idx] * log2(a[idx] / b[idx]))
  }
  
  0.5 * kl_div(p, m) + 0.5 * kl_div(q, m)
}

for (model_name in names(models)) {
  
  data <- models[[model_name]]
  
  baseline_data <- subset(data, gender == "default" & nation == "default")
  baseline_counts <- table(factor(baseline_data$school, levels = categories))
  
  baseline_probs <- (baseline_counts + 1) / sum(baseline_counts + 1)
  
  for (group_name in names(groups)) {
    
    filters <- groups[[group_name]]
    persona_data <- subset(data, gender == filters$gender & nation == filters$nation)
    
    observed <- table(factor(persona_data$school, levels = categories))
    
    if (sum(observed) == 0) {
      cat("\n[Warning] No data found for:", model_name, "-", group_name, "\n")
      next
    }
    
    observed_probs <- observed / sum(observed)
    
    if (group_name == "default") {
      
      chi_res <- chisq.test(x = observed, p = rep(1/length(categories), length(categories)))
      
      cat("\n======================================================\n")
      cat("STEP 1: SYSTEMIC BIAS (Technical Skew) | Model:", model_name, "\n")
      print(chi_res)
      
      # Cramér's V
      V <- sqrt(as.numeric(chi_res$statistic) / 
                (sum(observed) * (length(categories) - 1)))
      
      cat("Cramér's V (Effect Size of Tech Skew):", V, "\n")
      
    } else {
      
      expected <- sum(observed) * baseline_probs
      
      if (any(expected < 5)) {
        cat("\n[Warning] Low expected counts (<5) for:", model_name, "-", group_name, "\n")
      }
      
      chi_res <- suppressWarnings(
        chisq.test(x = observed, p = baseline_probs)
      )
      
      cat("\n--- STEP 2: TRIGGERED BIAS (Sensitivity) --- \n")
      cat("Model:", model_name, "| Persona:", group_name, "\n")
      print(chi_res)
      
      V_sens <- sqrt(as.numeric(chi_res$statistic) / 
                     (sum(observed) * (length(categories) - 1)))
      
      cat("Cramér's V (Persona Sensitivity):", V_sens, "\n")
      
      TVD <- 0.5 * sum(abs(observed_probs - baseline_probs))
      
      cat("Total Variation Distance (Robust Sensitivity):", TVD, "\n")
      
      JSD <- jsd(observed_probs, baseline_probs)

      cat("Jensen-Shannon Divergence:", JSD, "\n")
    }
  }
}
```



# Histrogramms Default
```{r schools-histogramms-default, echo=TRUE, message=FALSE, warning=FALSE}
schools_gpt_default <- subset(gpt_raw_schools, gender == "default" & nation == "default")
schools_deepseek_default <- subset(deepseek_raw_schools, gender == "default" & nation == "default")
schools_grok_default <- subset(grok_raw_schools, gender == "default" & nation == "default")

# Bar plots
ggplot(schools_gpt_default, aes(x = school)) +
  geom_bar(fill = "skyblue", color = "black") +
  theme_minimal() +
  labs(title = "Number of Requests per School (ChatGPT, default nation & gender)",
       x = "School",
       y = "Number of Requests") +
  theme(axis.text.x = element_text(angle = 45, hjust = 1))

ggplot(schools_deepseek_default, aes(x = school)) +
  geom_bar(fill = "skyblue", color = "black") +
  theme_minimal() +
  labs(title = "Number of Requests per School (DeepSeek, default nation & gender)",
       x = "School",
       y = "Number of Requests") +
  theme(axis.text.x = element_text(angle = 45, hjust = 1))

ggplot(schools_grok_default, aes(x = school)) +
  geom_bar(fill = "skyblue", color = "black") +
  theme_minimal() +
  labs(title = "Number of Requests per School (Grok, default nation & gender)",
       x = "School",
       y = "Number of Requests") +
  theme(axis.text.x = element_text(angle = 45, hjust = 1))
```

# Histrogramms Male
```{r faculties-histogramms-male, echo=TRUE, message=FALSE, warning=FALSE}
schools_gpt_male <- subset(gpt_raw_schools, gender == "male" & nation == "default")
schools_deepseek_male <- subset(deepseek_raw_schools, gender == "male" & nation == "default")
schools_grok_male <- subset(grok_raw_schools, gender == "male" & nation == "default")
# Bar plots
ggplot(schools_gpt_male, aes(x = school)) +
  geom_bar(fill = "skyblue", color = "black") +
  theme_minimal() +
  labs(title = "Number of Requests per School (ChatGPT, Male)",
       x = "School",
       y = "Number of Requests") +
  theme(axis.text.x = element_text(angle = 45, hjust = 1))

ggplot(schools_deepseek_male, aes(x = school)) +
  geom_bar(fill = "skyblue", color = "black") +
  theme_minimal() +
  labs(title = "Number of Requests per School (DeepSeek, Male)",
       x = "School",
       y = "Number of Requests") +
  theme(axis.text.x = element_text(angle = 45, hjust = 1))

ggplot(schools_grok_male, aes(x = school)) +
  geom_bar(fill = "skyblue", color = "black") +
  theme_minimal() +
  labs(title = "Number of Requests per School (Grok, Male)",
       x = "School",
       y = "Number of Requests") +
  theme(axis.text.x = element_text(angle = 45, hjust = 1))
```
# Histrogramms Female
```{r faculties-histogramms-female, echo=TRUE, message=FALSE, warning=FALSE}
schools_gpt_female <- subset(gpt_raw_schools, gender == "female" & nation == "default")
schools_deepseek_female <- subset(deepseek_raw_schools, gender == "female" & nation == "default")
schools_grok_female <- subset(grok_raw_schools, gender == "female" & nation == "default")
# Bar plots
ggplot(schools_gpt_female, aes(x = school)) +
  geom_bar(fill = "skyblue", color = "black") +
  theme_minimal() +
  labs(title = "Number of Requests per School (ChatGPT, Female)",
       x = "School",
       y = "Number of Requests") +
  theme(axis.text.x = element_text(angle = 45, hjust = 1))

ggplot(schools_deepseek_female, aes(x = school)) +
  geom_bar(fill = "skyblue", color = "black") +
  theme_minimal() +
  labs(title = "Number of Requests per School (DeepSeek, Female)",
       x = "School",
       y = "Number of Requests") +
  theme(axis.text.x = element_text(angle = 45, hjust = 1))

ggplot(schools_grok_female, aes(x = school)) +
  geom_bar(fill = "skyblue", color = "black") +
  theme_minimal() +
  labs(title = "Number of Requests per School (Grok, Female)",
       x = "School",
       y = "Number of Requests") +
  theme(axis.text.x = element_text(angle = 45, hjust = 1))
```
# Histrogramms Non-Binary
```{r faculties-histogramms-non-binary, echo=TRUE, message=FALSE, warning=FALSE}
schools_gpt_non_binary <- subset(gpt_raw_schools, gender == "non_binary" & nation == "default")
schools_deepseek_non_binary <- subset(deepseek_raw_schools, gender == "non_binary" & nation == "default")
schools_grok_non_binary <- subset(grok_raw_schools, gender == "non_binary" & nation == "default")
# Bar plots
ggplot(schools_gpt_non_binary, aes(x = school)) +
  geom_bar(fill = "skyblue", color = "black") +
  theme_minimal() +
  labs(title = "Number of Requests per School (ChatGPT, Non Binary)",
       x = "School",
       y = "Number of Requests") +
  theme(axis.text.x = element_text(angle = 45, hjust = 1))

ggplot(schools_deepseek_non_binary, aes(x = school)) +
  geom_bar(fill = "skyblue", color = "black") +
  theme_minimal() +
  labs(title = "Number of Requests per School (DeepSeek, Non Binary)",
       x = "School",
       y = "Number of Requests") +
  theme(axis.text.x = element_text(angle = 45, hjust = 1))

ggplot(schools_grok_non_binary, aes(x = school)) +
  geom_bar(fill = "skyblue", color = "black") +
  theme_minimal() +
  labs(title = "Number of Requests per School (Grok, Non Binary)",
       x = "School",
       y = "Number of Requests") +
  theme(axis.text.x = element_text(angle = 45, hjust = 1))
```

# Histrogramms Paper
```{r histogramms-paper, echo=TRUE, message=FALSE, warning=FALSE}
schools_deepseek_non_binary <- subset(deepseek_raw_schools, gender == "non_binary" & nation == "default")

ggplot(schools_deepseek_non_binary, aes(x = school)) +
  geom_bar(fill = "skyblue", color = "black") +
  theme_minimal() +
  theme(
    axis.text.y = element_text(size = 11, face = "bold"),
  ) +
  coord_flip() +
  labs(x = "School",
       y = "Number of Recommendations") +
  theme(axis.text.x = element_text(angle = 45, hjust = 1))

ggsave("school_requests_non_binary_deepseek.pdf", width = 7, height = 5, dpi = 300)


schools_deepseek_default <- subset(deepseek_raw_schools, gender == "default" & nation == "default")

ggplot(schools_deepseek_default, aes(x = school)) +
  geom_bar(fill = "skyblue", color = "black") +
  theme_minimal() +
  theme(
    axis.text.y = element_text(size = 11, face = "bold"),
  ) +
  coord_flip() +
  labs(x = "School",
       y = "Number of Recommendations") +
  theme(axis.text.x = element_text(angle = 45, hjust = 1))

ggsave("school_requests_default_deepseek.pdf", width = 7, height = 5, dpi = 300)

```

</div></pre>
